params.effect: be the target of effects that inflict damage or steal blood as a retainer could be

effects.text: be the target of effects that inflict damage or steal blood as a retainer could be

Only usable when another minion you control enters combat with a minion without flight. Lock this minion. In that combat, this minion may make a hand or melee weapon strike (with or without a strike card) on the opposing minion during normal strike resolution (as if at close range). Dodge will avoid this strike, and damage prevention effects can treat this as a strike from an opposing minion. This minion may be the target of effects that inflict damage or steal blood as a retainer could be.
